aaliyah nye.comment: Nye is out for Thursday's game in Indiana due to a left knee injury.

brionna jones.comment: The Dream expect Jones (knee) to resume team activities in the coming weeks, per Myles Ehrlich of Winsidr.com.

maddy westbeld.comment: Westbeld (coach's decision) won't play in Wednesday's game versus New York.

courtney vandersloot.comment: Vandersloot (knee) does not have a timetable to return to the court.

dijonai carrington.comment: Carrington (foot) remains without a timetable to return.

rickea jackson.comment: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

ashlon jackson.comment: Jackson (coach's decision) is out for Wednesday's game against the Mystics.

hailey van lith.comment: Van Lith (ankle) is out for Wednesday's game against the Mystics.

odyssey sims.comment: Sims (ankle) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Fire.

ashten prechtel.comment: Prechtel (coach's decision) won't play Wednesday versus Dallas.

miela sowah.comment: Sowah (coach's decision) is listed as out for Wednesday's game versus Dallas.

iliana rupert.comment: Rupert is pregnant, and the Valkyries have filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports Thursday.

caitlin clark.comment: Clark (back) is probable for Thursday's game versus the Dream.

cameron brink.comment: Brink (ankle), who has already been ruled out for Wednesday's game against Minnesota, is expected to miss multiple contests, per David Mendez-Yapkowitz of ClutchPoints.com.

janiah barker.comment: Barker (leg) is out for Wednesday's game against Phoenix.

dana evans.comment: Evans (leg) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Lynx.

napheesa collier.comment: Collier (ankle) has yet to resume full on-court activities, per Andrew Dukowitz of ZoneCoverage.com.

dorka juhasz.comment: Juhasz (foot) is expected to remain out for another 2-to-3 weeks, Pat Borzi of MinnPost reports.

emma cechova.comment: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

sami whitcomb.comment: Whitcomb will undergo an arthroscopy on Thursday to remove a loose body in her left knee. She will be re-evaluated in four to six weeks, Shane Young of the Mercury's official site reports.

jordan harrison.comment: Harrison (coach's decision) won't suit up for Wednesday's game against the Storm.

ezi magbegor.comment: The Storm announced Monday that Magbegor is expected to miss at least 6-8 weeks due to a right foot injury, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports.

julie allemand.comment: Allemand (head) will not return to Tuesday's game against Indiana, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports. She'll finish with no points (0-2 FG, 0-2 3Pt) and one assist across 11 minutes.

brittney sykes.comment: Sykes (foot) won't return to Tuesday's game against the Fever, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports. She'll finish with 11 points (5-8 FG, 1-1 3Pt, 0-1 FT), three assists and two rebounds across 19 minutes.

nyara sabally.comment: Sabally (hamstring) is listed as out for Tuesday's game against Indiana.

kiki iriafen.comment: Iriafen (ankle) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game in Connecticut.
